languages.text: Вы сдерживаете самоубийственный порыв — при страже пытаться не стоит. Здесь нужен помощник с ловкими руками.

traits.locale_text: Вы сдерживаете самоубийственный порыв — при страже пытаться не стоит. Здесь нужен помощник с ловкими руками.

languages.text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.
languages.original_text: Вы сдерживаете самоубийственный порыв — при страже пытаться не стоит. Здесь нужен помощник с ловкими руками.

traits.locale_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.
You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.
You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

languages.text: Du unterdrückst den selbstzerstörerischen Impuls ... vor den Wachen ist es den Versuch nicht wert. Du brauchst einen Komplizen mit flinken Fingern.
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: Du unterdrückst den selbstzerstörerischen Impuls ... vor den Wachen ist es den Versuch nicht wert. Du brauchst einen Komplizen mit flinken Fingern.

languages.text: 你压制住了那股引火上身的冲动——当着守卫的面动手得不偿失，你需要一个手脚灵活的帮手。
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: 你压制住了那股引火上身的冲动——当着守卫的面动手得不偿失，你需要一个手脚灵活的帮手。

languages.text: Vous réprimez cette impulsion autodestructrice. Ces gardes n'en valent pas la peine. Vous avez besoin d'un complice aux doigts agiles.
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: Vous réprimez cette impulsion autodestructrice. Ces gardes n'en valent pas la peine. Vous avez besoin d'un complice aux doigts agiles.

languages.text: Reprimes tu impulso suicida; no merece la pena intentarlo delante de los guardias. Necesitas un cómplice que tenga los dedos ágiles.
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: Reprimes tu impulso suicida; no merece la pena intentarlo delante de los guardias. Necesitas un cómplice que tenga los dedos ágiles.

languages.text: Kendine zarar verme dürtüsünü bastırıyorsun... Muhafızların önünde denemeye değmez. Çevik parmaklı bir suç ortağına ihtiyacın var.
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: Kendine zarar verme dürtüsünü bastırıyorsun... Muhafızların önünde denemeye değmez. Çevik parmaklı bir suç ortağına ihtiyacın var.

languages.text: 自爆衝動を抑え、警備員の前では試みない。巧みな手先の相棒が必要だ。
languages.original_text: You suppress the self-destructive impulse — it is not worth attempting in front of the guards. You need an accomplice with nimble fingers.

traits.locale_text: 自爆衝動を抑え、警備員の前では試みない。巧みな手先の相棒が必要だ。
